title: Umberto Bossi, Fiery Founder of Italian Separatist Party, Dies at 84
summary_full: A charismatic populist, he channeled the anger of a disaffected North, arguing — in inflammatory oratory — for secession and railing against a tide of migrants.
summary_public: A charismatic populist, he channeled the anger of a disaffected North, arguing — in inflammatory oratory — for secession and railing against a tide of migrants.

IT.label: negative
IT.evidence: railing against a tide of migrants.
